'''Ejai'''<ref name="Dressing">''[[Dressing a Galaxy: The Costumes of Star Wars]]''</ref> was a fair-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="rots" /> with [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]]<ref name="Complete Visual" /> who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="rots" /> as a [[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|lieutenant colonel]]<ref name="Dressing" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. With the Empire having formed that [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Ejai was one of the first [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]]. He served aboard one of the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]]<ref name="CSWE" /> overseeing the construction of the Empire's [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]].<ref name="rots" />

In 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> Ejai was overseeing the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] pit crews when [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], and [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] were aboard to oversee the DS-1 Orbital Battle Station's construction.<ref name="rots" /> Ejai had a disciplined expression commanding respect<ref name="Complete Visual" /> and wore the standard [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|Imperial officer's uniform]].<ref name="rots" />

==Behind the scenes==
Portrayed by [[Alex Lissine]],<ref name="Lissine">{{WebCite|url=https://www.starnow.com/u/alexlissine/media/photos|text=ALEX LISSINE - Photos|work=[https://www.starnow.com.au StarNow]|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/M8Jl0|archivedate=2022-08-23}}</ref> who was uncredited, Ejai was created for the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].<ref name="rots" /> Prior to the film's [[May 19]], [[2005]] release,<ref name="Year by Year">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]''</ref> Ejai was first pictured in ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]'',<ref name="Sith Visual">''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> released [[April 2]] the same year.<ref name="Amazon">{{DK|url=us/9780756611286-star-wars-revenge-of-the-sith-the-visual-dictionary|text=Star Wars Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary|nolive=1}}</ref> He was first named by [[Trisha Biggar]]'s reference book ''[[Dressing a Galaxy: The Costumes of Star Wars]]'',<ref name="Dressing" /> published on [[October 11]] of that year.<ref name="DressingDate">{{WebCite|url=https://www.waterstones.com/book/dressing-a-galaxy-part-1/trisha-biggar/george-lucas/9780810959644|text=Dressing a Galaxy: Part 1: The Costumes of Star Wars (Hardback)|work=[https://www.waterstones.com/ Waterstones]|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/mxQvt|archivedate=2022-04-24}}</ref> The scene Ejai appeared in was filmed [[September 17]], [[2003]] at [[Fox Studios, Sydney]].<ref name="Making">''[[The Making of Star Wars Revenge of the Sith]]''</ref>
